/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/ipc_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/monitors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/root_atoms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/stb_image_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/wallpaper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/wallpaper_v.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/xcb_pxf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/shm/xcb_shm_check.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xwd.dir/src/shm/shm_seg.cpp.o -o bin/xwd  /usr/lib64/libxcb.so /usr/lib64/libxcb-xinerama.so /usr/lib64/libxcb-shm.so /usr/lib/libavformat.so /usr/lib/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/libavutil.so /usr/lib/libswscale.so
